description_long: This is a green glass wine bottle with a cylindrical body and a long, narrow neck topped by a deep red closure. The front of the bottle features a large, rectangular white label with a crest at the top and the text 'BARON DE LEY' in bold, along with additional details and decorative elements in smaller print. The bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The neck is covered by a matching red capsule that extends down to the shoulder of the bottle. The back of the bottle has a plain white label, likely for regulatory or product information. The overall design is classic and elegant, suitable for a premium wine product.
description: A green glass wine bottle with a red capsule and detailed front label, featuring a classic and elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main white label with crest and text, red capsule on the neck.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view, showing the green glass body and partial side of the front label.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain white label and the full green glass body with red capsule.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view, showing the green glass body and partial side of the front label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label: large white rectangle with a crest at the top, 'BARON DE LEY' in bold, additional text and decorative elements; back label: plain white rectangle. Labels are centered and cover a significant portion of the bottle's body.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, straight neck with a slight taper towards the top and a flared lip.
